acquisition method: The Q-Exactive mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode
alkylation reagent: Carbamidomethylation of cysteine residues was set as a fixed modification
cleavage agent: trypsin was used as the digestion enzyme
fractionation method: denatured and loaded on a SDS gel to produce one gel band
instrument: connected to a Q-Exactive HF orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nano-electrospray ion source
labeling: Peptides were analyzed using a nano Liquid Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry/Mass Spectrometry (nanoLC-MS/MS) system
